1fr}.strip{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;text-align:center;color:#130c05;font-family:"Comic Sans MS","Marker Felt","Chalkboard SE",cursive;font-weight:900;letter-spacing:.05em;font-size:.78rem;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;padding:0 4px}.green .strip{background:var(--green);color:#041307}.yellow .strip{background:var(--yellow)}.blue .strip{background:var(--blue);color:#04131d}.red .strip{background:var(--red);color:#210305}.white .strip{background:var(--white)}.jack-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(24,minmax(38px,1fr));align-items:start;gap:0;padding:5px 3px}.jack-cell{display:grid;place-items:center;gap:2px;min-width:0}.jack{width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid #252525;background:radial-gradient(circle at 35% 30%,#fff7dc 0 13%,#b9a77b 14% 35%,#312719 37% 54%,#010101 55% 100%);box-shadow:0 2px 5px rgba(0,0,0,.7),inset 0 1px 1px rgba(255,255,255,.2);position:relative;z-index:5}.jack:hover,.jack.selected{outline:3px solid rgba(244,202,98,.7);outline-offset:2px;transform:scale(1.1)}.jack.required::before{content:"";position:absolute;inset:-5px;border:2px solid rgba(255,225,115,.65);border-radius:50%}.jack.correct::after{content:"";position:absolute;inset:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--ok);box-shadow:0 0 8px var(--ok)}.jack.wrong::after{content:"";position:absolute;inset:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--bad);box-shadow:0 0 8px var(--bad)}.jack-label{font-size:.48rem;line-height:1.03;text-align:center;color:#e7dcc3;max-width:52px;height:20px;overflow:hidden;display:-webkit-box;-webkit-line-clamp:2;-webkit-box-orient:vertical}.jack.required + .jack-label{color:#fff2aa}.cable-layer{position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;overflow:visible;z-index:18}.cable-shadow{fill:none;stroke:rgba(0,0,0,.65);stroke-width:8;stroke-linecap:round}.cable{fill:none;stroke-width:4.5;stroke-linecap:round;filter:drop-shadow(0 4px 5px rgba(0,0,0,.55));animation:draw .16s ease-out}.cable.correct{stroke:var(--ok)}.cable.wrong{stroke:var(--bad)}.cable.preview{stroke:rgba(120,210,255,.82);stroke-dasharray:8 7}.signal{fill:none;stroke:rgba(255,255,255,.8);stroke-width:1.7;stroke-dasharray:1 16;animation:move .7s linear infinite}.board-footer{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:8px;padding:8px 12px;border-top:1px solid var(--line);background:rgba(0,0,0,.22);color:var(--muted);font-size:.78rem}@keyframes move{to{stroke-dashoffset:-34}}@keyframes draw{from{opacity:.2;stroke-dasharray:10 20}to{opacity:1;stroke-dasharray:0}}

SE",cursive;font-weight:900;letter-spacing:.05em;font-size:.78rem;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;padding:0 4px}.green .strip{background:var(--green);color:#041307}.yellow .strip{background:var(--yellow)}.blue .strip{background:var(--blue);color:#04131d}.red .strip{background:var(--red);color:#210305}.white .strip{background:var(--white)}.jack-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(24,minmax(38px,1fr));align-items:start;gap:0;padding:5px 3px}.jack-cell{display:grid;place-items:center;gap:2px;min-width:0}.jack{width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid #252525;background:radial-gradient(circle at 35% 30%,#fff7dc 0 13%,#b9a77b 14% 35%,#312719 37% 54%,#010101 55% 100%);box-shadow:0 2px 5px rgba(0,0,0,.7),inset 0 1px 1px rgba(255,255,255,.2);position:relative;z-index:5}.jack:hover,.jack.selected{outline:3px solid rgba(244,202,98,.7);outline-offset:2px;transform:scale(1.1)}.jack.required::before{content:"";position:absolute;inset:-5px;border:2px solid rgba(255,225,115,.65);border-radius:50%}.jack.correct::after{content:"";position:absolute;inset:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--ok);box-shadow:0 0 8px var(--ok)}.jack.wrong::after{content:"";position:absolute;inset:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--bad);box-shadow:0 0 8px var(--bad)}.jack-label{font-size:.48rem;line-height:1.03;text-align:center;color:#e7dcc3;max-width:52px;height:20px;overflow:hidden;display:-webkit-box;-webkit-line-clamp:2;-webkit-box-orient:vertical}.jack.required + .jack-label{color:#fff2aa}.cable-layer{position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;overflow:visible;z-index:18}.cable-shadow{fill:none;stroke:rgba(0,0,0,.65);stroke-width:8;stroke-linecap:round}.cable{fill:none;stroke-width:4.5;stroke-linecap:round;filter:drop-shadow(0 4px 5px rgba(0,0,0,.55));animation:draw .16s ease-out}.cable.correct{stroke:var(--ok)}.cable.wrong{stroke:var(--bad)}.cable.preview{stroke:rgba(120,210,255,.82);stroke-dasharray:8 7}.signal{fill:none;stroke:rgba(255,255,255,.8);stroke-width:1.7;stroke-dasharray:1 16;animation:move .7s linear infinite}.board-footer{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:8px;padding:8px 12px;border-top:1px solid var(--line);background:rgba(0,0,0,.22);color:var(--muted);font-size:.78rem}@keyframes move{to{stroke-dashoffset:-34}}@keyframes draw{from{opacity:.2;stroke-dasharray:10 20}to{opacity:1;stroke-dasharray:0}}
